steps.title: Set up
steps.content: Distribute both sides of the equation. Left side: $40(x-2) = 40x - 80$. Right side: $5(-16+8x) = -80 + 40x$. The equation becomes $$40x - 80 = 40x - 80$$

steps.title: Solve
steps.content: Subtract $40x$ from both sides: $-80 = -80$. This is always true regardless of $x$, so every real number is a solution — the equation has infinitely many solutions.
